title: Cardinal Bembo's Epitaph On Raphael
content:
Here's one in whom Nature feared - faint at such vying -
    Eclipse while he lived, and decease at his dying.
meaning:
Thomas Hardy's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Cardinal Bembo's Epitaph On Raphael"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
